description_long: This nightstand is constructed primarily from medium-toned wood, featuring a rectangular body with a slightly protruding base and a beveled top. The front face is adorned with three vertically aligned drawers, each decorated with a grid of square panels and metallic rivet-like accents, giving it a robust, almost industrial appearance. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the natural wood grain without any visible hardware or ornamentation. The base is solid and blocky, providing stability and a sense of groundedness. The overall design is both functional and decorative, with the front paneling serving as the main visual highlight. The craftsmanship suggests durability and a style that could complement both traditional and urban interiors.
description: A sturdy wooden nightstand with three decorative front drawers featuring paneling and rivet accents, set on a solid block base.
description_view_0: Side view showing plain wood grain panels with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: Back view with a flat, unadorned wooden surface and no visible hardware.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, displaying plain wood grain panels.
description_view_3: Front view displaying three decorative drawers with paneling and rivet-like accents, the main interactive face.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside a bed
